title: Amtech B1400 Revolving Leather Punch Plier, Hole Puncher for Belt, Canvas, Plastics, and Textiles
features: DURABLE: This revolving leather punch plier is made from strong, chrome plated steel for durability
VERSATILE: It is ideal for making holes in soft materials such as canvas, leather, soft plastics and textiles
PUNCH SIZES: The revolving spring loaded head has six punch sizes: 2mm, 2.5mm, 3mm, 3.5mm, 4mm and 4.5mm
PRECISION CONTROL: Easy to handle with good balance for accurate work.
COMPACT DESIGN: Versatile tool for carpentry, assembly, and general household repairs.
description: From the manufacturer Ideal product for making holes in belts, bags, and watch belts Reasons to Buy!! 6-hole punch sizes : This revolving punch plier tool gives you six different punching options. Multi-Use : The plier is used to press eyelets into different soft materials such as leather, soft plastics, textiles, canvas and more. You can also use this tool to punch cardboard, paper, cards, and more. Easy to use : The plier is very easy to use, simply rotate the adjustable head towards the selected location for the punch hole. Then insert your material and squeeze the plastic-coated handles together. Durable Material : The punch plier has a durable chrome-plated steel body with plastic coated handles to give the tool extra comfort. See More
